name: evaluate-map
description: Evaluate every component of a chain map (scatter model). Parses the map, then fans out two independent per-component passes: positions each component in evolution via the llm-direct strategy (primary), and surfaces the underlying capability of each component via identify (observation, envelope-only). Returns the chain AST annotated with EvolutionAnnotation per component. (All per-component work is parallel fan-out steps; listeners do not fan out, so a once-per-run observer such as property-assessment belongs on a transformative-flow recipe, not here.)
